description: 密钥输入方式与 SecretRef 提示

replacements.\"How do you want to provide this API ke: "你想如何提供此 API 密钥？"
replacements.\"Stores the key directly in OpenClaw co: "将密钥直接存储在 OpenClaw 配置中"
replacements.\"Stores a reference to env or configure: "存储对环境变量或已配置外部密钥提供商的引用"
replacements.\"Where is this API key stored?\": "此 API 密钥存储在哪里？"
replacements.\"Use a configured file or exec secret p: "使用已配置的文件或 exec 密钥提供商"
replacements.\"No file/exec secret providers are conf: "尚未配置文件或 exec 密钥提供商。请在 secrets.providers 下添加，或选择环境变量。"
